Skill.Name: Bolt
Skill.Description: Fire a bolt at an enemy character

Skill.Name: Arcane Bolt
Skill.Description: Fire a powerful bolt of magical energy

Skill.Name: Flaming Weapons
Skill.Description: Enchant your allies' weapons with fire

Skill.Name: Inferno
Skill.Description: Engulf your target in a torrent of flame and singe nearby foes

Skill.Name: Rock Armor
Skill.Description: Create magical armor for your allies

Skill.Name: Earthquake
Skill.Description: Swaps the targets in the front and back columns

Skill.Name: Lightning
Skill.Description: A bolt of lighting will attack your target and his neighbors

Skill.Name: Storm
Skill.Description: Call down bolts of lightning to zap all enemies

Skill.Name: Frostbite
Skill.Description: A freezing attack that cripples your enemy

Skill.Name: Blizzard
Skill.Description: Driving snow reduces your enemies' defenses

Skill.Name: Heal
Skill.Description: Restores hearts to target

Skill.Name: Mass Heal
Skill.Description: Restore hearts to all your allies

Skill.Name: Regeneration
Skill.Description: Restores hearts for many turns to one ally

Skill.Name: Mass Regeneration
Skill.ToolTip: Restores hearts for many turns to all allies
Skill.Description: Restores hearts for many turns to all allies

Skill.Name: Magic Shield
Skill.Description: Cloak your ally in a mystical aura that defends them from magical attacks

Skill.Name: Haste
Skill.Description: Cause your ally to act faster

Skill.Name: Grease
Skill.Description: Cover your enemies in grease, reducing agility and fire defense

Skill.Name: Stinging Swarm
Skill.Description: Damage a row of targets each turn

Skill.Name: Staff Mastery
Skill.Description: Increases agility when staff equipped

Skill.Name: Summon Spider
Skill.Description: Summons a spider to fight beside your party

Skill.Name: Summon Wolf
Skill.Description: Summons a wolf to fight beside your party

Skill.Name: Summon Halla
Skill.Description: Summons a halla to fight beside your party

Skill.Name: Taunt
Skill.Description: Taunt your enemies into attacking only you

Skill.Name: Summon Bear
Skill.Description: Summons a bear to fight beside your party

Skill.Name: Summon Bronto
Skill.Description: Summons a bronto to fight beside your party

Skill.Name: Summon Drake
Skill.Description: Summons a drake to fight beside your party

Skill.Name: Mana Drain
Skill.Description: Removes mana from the target enemy

Skill.Name: Life Drain
Skill.Description: Drains hearts from the target enemy, and adds them to the caster

Skill.Name: Walking Bomb
Skill.Description: Turns the target into a bomb, which will explode upon death

Skill.Name: Weaken
Skill.ToolTip: Decreases target's attack and does minor damage
Skill.Description: Saps the enemy's strength, damaging it and weakening its attack

Skill.Name: Paralyze
Skill.Description: Cripples the target enemy

Skill.Name: Mass Paralyze
Skill.ToolTip: Cripples all enemies in a column
Skill.Description: Cripple all enemies in a column

Skill.Name: Disorient
Skill.Description: Confuses target enemy, causing him to attack other enemies

Skill.Name: Cleanse

StatAction.CustomDescription: Removes shattered, crushed, terror, earthquake, blizzard, grease, timebomb, acid bomb, swarmed, weakened, burning, low blow, disarmed, confused, disoriented, vulnerability hex, thrown voice, harsh language, frozen, poisoned, shredded, burned, crippled, and reduced resistance

Skill.ToolTip: Clears an ally of all ailments.
Skill.Description: Removes all ailments from an ally

Skill.Name: Vulnerability Hex
Skill.ToolTip: Decreases target's attack and does minor damage
Skill.Description: Lowers all of an enemy's resistances.

Skill.Name: Barrier
Skill.Description: Increases Melee, Ranged, and Magic Resistance

Skill.Name: Crushing Prison
Skill.Description: Deals heavy damage over time and cripples lesser foes

Skill.Name: Dispel Magic
Skill.Description: Dispels beneficial effects from enemies for 3 turns, +1 per 3 upgrades

Skill.Name: Death Siphon
Skill.ToolTip: Enemy gives you mana upon death
Skill.Description: When the enemy dies, your team gains 1 mana. Does not cost mana.

Skill.Name: Arcane Shield
Skill.Description: Increases your chance to dodge attacks.

Skill.Name: Heroism
Skill.Description: Increases one ally's effectiveness and survivability.

Skill.Name: Mass Haste
Skill.Description: Cause your entire party to act faster

Skill.Name: Fast Heal
Skill.Description: Restores hearts to target, does not end turn

Skill.Name: Rejuvenate
Skill.Description: Restores mana and health to one ally.

Skill.Name: Elemental Mastery
Skill.Description: Increases the damage of your elemental attacks

Skill.Name: Firebolt
Skill.Description: Deals minor fire damage and sets the target on fire

Skill.Name: Cone of Cold

Stats.CustomDescription: 30% chance to weaken and deal extra damage

Skill.Description: A blast of freezing cold damages adjacent foes and can weaken them

Skill.Name: Petrify
Skill.Description: Cripples lesser foes, weakens and lowers defenses

Skill.Name: Tempest
Skill.Description: Summon a lightning storm for several turns, damaging foe health and mana
